# OpenAI Developer Community

## Main Categories
- API
- Announcements
- GPT builders
- Bugs
- Community
- Codex
- Codex CLI
- Prompting
- ChatGPT Apps SDK

## Recent Topics & Features Mentioned

**API & Models:**
- GPT-5* models
- GPT-5.4-mini
- GPT-5.4-nano
- Sora-2 API
- gpt-realtime-1.5
- gpt-image-1.5
- gpt-image-1
- Dall-E 3

**Key Features/Services:**
- "MCP server tools now in ChatGPT -- developer mode"
- "MCP App publishing" (early access requested)
- Realtime API with speech capabilities
- Web Search pricing for reasoning models
- Images/edits endpoint
- Priority Service Tier

**Tools/Products:**
- Codex (Windows app, CLI)
- Atlas Browser
- ChatGPT Apps SDK
- ChatGPT Commerce

**Recent Issues Reported:**
- Codex performance slowdowns
- Authentication flow problems
- Billing/token charging errors
- Model system prompt non-compliance
- Video duration restrictions

**Notable Discussions:**
- Merchant integration for ChatGPT commerce
- British accent voices timeline
- Structured prompt frameworks
- AI-themed media recommendations
